title: AI in 2026: The Agentic Era
excerpt: In 2026, AI is doing more than just chatting—it is actually getting work done! This update looks at how AI 'agents' can now plan and finish entire projects on their own. We also check out the top books to read this year and the big tech meetings happening in places like Singapore and Las Vegas. If you want to know how computers are becoming more like helpful partners than just search engines, this is the post for you.
author: Andrew Nguyen

title: How Jeff Bezos Communicates for Success
excerpt:
Have you ever wondered how Jeff Bezos turned a small business into Amazon? In the book 'The Bezos Blueprint', Carmine Gallo explains the secret is communication.

1. Keep It Simple: Bezos banned PowerPoint and replaced them with narrative memos.
2. Use Metaphors: The Flywheel Effect and Two-Pizza Teams are core to Amazon's culture.
3. Focus on the Customer: They 'work backward' from a press release.
4. Tell Better Stories: Use a beginning, middle, and end.

The 'Day One' Mindset: Always act like a startup. Whether writing an essay or a project, remember: keep it simple and focus on the customer.
author: Andrew Nguyen
